name: Loan Eligibility Calculator
description: Estimate your loan eligibility based on income & expenses.

example.explanation: With ₹80,000 income and ₹15,000 obligations, at 8% for 20 years, loan eligibility is ₹32,55,609.

faqs.question: What is loan eligibility?
faqs.answer: It is the maximum loan amount a lender may approve based on your income and obligations.

faqs.question: Why do obligations matter?
faqs.answer: Existing EMIs or debts reduce the amount you can pay toward a new loan.

faqs.question: Is this the actual approved amount?
faqs.answer: No, this is an estimate. Actual approval depends on credit score, employment, and other factors.
